CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARAY, MIRIAM JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MIRIAM GARAY'S PETITION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MUST PAY MONTHLY MORTGAGE PAYMENTS OF $2,999.43 DURING PENDENCY OF THE INJUNCTION. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DO SO, DEFENDANTS MAY REQUEST THAT THE COURT LIFT THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. IN ADDITION, THE COURT INDICATED THAT PLAINTIFF IS TO START MAKING MONTHLY PAYMENTS BEGINNING IN MARCH, BY THE 7TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, DIRECTLY TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING (COPY GIVEN TO PLAINTIFF, TO SERVE DEFENDANT). JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
ORDER RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Mar-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CENTRAL MORTGAGE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. Appearances: Miriam Garay (no phone number provided) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona; Elana J. Moeder of Pite Duncan (714.285.2633) appearing via court call for defendant and moving party. Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff to plead facts showing she is within the statute of limitations; fraud with specificity as to each defendant; and tender or facts showing why tender should not be required. The court granted plaintiff 30 days leave to amend. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2011 Continued To Apr-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Mar-04-2011 Continued To Mar-22-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CENTRAL MORTGAGE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. Appearances: David M. Liu of Pite Duncan LLP (714.285.2636) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party; Miriam Garay (925.323.6799) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona. The court received plaintiff's opposition this morning. Discussed and the court ruled as follows: continued to March 22, 2011. Plaintiff to mail a copy of the opposition to defendant. Defendant to file a reply by March 11, 2011. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Temporary Restraining Order And Osc Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MIRIAM GARAY'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Miriam Garay, 925/323-6799 pltf & moving party in propria; David M. Liu, Esq. of Pite Duncan, LLP 714/285-2633 for deft & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - PETITION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MUST PAY MONTHLY MORTGAGE PAYMENTS OF $2,999.43 DURING PENDENCY OF THE INJUNCTION. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DO SO, DEFENDANTS MAY REQUEST THAT THE COURT LIFT THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. In addition, the Court indicated that plaintiff is to start making monthly payments beginning in March, by the 7th day of each month, directly to defendant's counsel. Order signed after hearing (copy given to plaintiff, to serve defendant). (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
